eggplant-with-buttermilk-sauce.name: Eggplant With Buttermilk Sauce

ingredients.item: Lemon thyme leaves (regular thyme will do)
ingredients.prep: plus a few whole sprigs to garnish

ingredients.item: Maldon sea salt and black pepper

instructions: Preheat the oven to 177°C. Cut the eggplants in half lengthways, cutting straight through the green stalk (the stalk is for the look; don't eat it). Use a small sharp knife to make three or four parallel incisions in the cut side of each eggplant half, without cutting through to the skin. Repeat at a 45-degree angle to get a diamond-shaped pattern.

Place the eggplant halves, cut-side up, on a baking sheet lined with parchment paper. Brush them with olive oil—keep on brushing until all of the oil has been absorbed by the flesh. Sprinkle with the lemon thyme leaves and some salt and pepper. Roast for 35 to 40 minutes, at which point the flesh should be soft, flavorful, and nicely browned. Remove from the oven and let cool completely.

While the eggplants are in the oven, cut the pomegranate into two horizontally. Hold one half over a bowl, with the cut side against your palm, and use the back of a wooden spoon or a rolling pin to gently knock on the pomegranate skin. Continue beating with increasing power until the seeds start coming out naturally and falling through your fingers into the bowl. Once all are there, sift through the seeds and remove any bits of white skin or membrane.
To make the sauce, whisk together all of the ingredients. Taste for seasoning, then keel cold until needed.

To serve, spoon plenty of buttermilk sauce over the eggplant halves without covering the stalks. Sprinkle za'atar and plenty of pomegranate seeds on top and garnish with lemon thyme. Finish with a drizzle of olive oil.

enchiladas-the-mexican-dish-that-will-co.name: Enchiladas, The Mexican Dish That Will Conquer Your Palate (and Heart)
enchiladas-the-mexican-dish-that-will-co.original_name: Enchiladas, el plato mexicano que conquistará tu paladar (y corazón)

ingredients.item: 2 chiles serranos (ajusta al gusto por el picante)
200 g de queso fresco o queso rallado
Crema fresca o nata agria para servir

instructions: In a big pot, put chicken, onion into rooms, garlic teeth, and get to taste. Cover with water and lead to boiling. It reduces fire and cooks with low heat till the chicken's completely baked and tender about 25 minutes. Once cooked, remove the chicken from the broth, let it cool a little and clear the meat with two forks. Reserve.

Roast tomatoes and chilies into a comal or frying pan with medium-high heat till they are shamed and soft. In a blender, mix the roasted tomatoes and chilies with a minced onion and garlic and get a soft sauce. Warm up some oil in a frying pan and pour the sauce. Cooking for about 10 minutes, with salt and pepper to taste. Reserve.

Warm up tortillas in a comal or microwave so that they are more flexible and do not break up with them. In a small frying pan, it heats up enough oil to slightly fry tortillas one by one, only a few seconds from each side. That makes them more malleable and adds flavour. Listen to them well.
Mix some of the salsa with the pitted chicken. Fill the corn tortillas with chicken, roll and place them in an oven fountain. Repeat the same process with the rest of the tortillas.
Once you have put the enchiladas at the fountain, put the rest of the enchiladas sauce onto them and make sure to cover them completely. Add the grated cheese above.
Bean about 10 minutes, till the cheese has completely melted and the enchiladas are hot. Before serving, let the enchiladas stand for 5 minutes.
It serves with more salsa and sour cream. You can decorate with some fresh cilantro, onions or fresh onions, or if you prefer a more hot touch with some preserved jalapeno.

enjoy-this-delicious-vegetarian-lentil-c.name: Enjoy This Delicious Vegetarian Lentil Chili

Take the peppers, remove the seed and lava. Cut into small notebooks. Do the same with onion.
Warm a pot with olive oil. Once at temperature, pits garlic and onion and peppers. He's been breathing well for about 5 minutes and keeps his move.
Incorpora los tomates enlatados junto al comino, la paprika, la cayena, pimienta y sal al gusto. Mezcla y cocina por 5 minutos a fuego medio.
Ahora, agrega las lentejas y las 4 tazas de agua. Mezcla bien y cocina a fuego medio por 45 minutos.
After that time, lentils have to be to the dente. Add the corn can and tahini, mix and finish cooking for another 5 minutes.
Rectifica de sal, si crees que le falta sal, agrega un poco sin excederte. Termina de cocinar por 3 minutos y apaga.
Retira del fuego y deja reposar.
To serve, join with your favorite garrison.
